# Dataset Examples

This folder introduces the datasets distributed with `tspredit`. Its purpose is practical: help the reader understand what kind of series each packaged object provides before choosing a forecasting workflow.

In `tspredit`, datasets are documented in both `R/data.R` and `R/tspredbench.R`. Following the same principle used in `harbinger`, each notebook below focuses on one dataset object.

## Introductory Dataset

- [01-tsd.md](/examples/datasets/01-tsd.md) - synthetic series used across the introductory examples.

## Energy and Macroeconomic Benchmarks

- [02-eunite-loads.md](/examples/datasets/02-eunite-loads.md) - half-hourly electrical loads from the EUNITE competition.
- [03-eunite-reg.md](/examples/datasets/03-eunite-reg.md) - calendar regressors packaged with EUNITE.
- [04-eunite-temp.md](/examples/datasets/04-eunite-temp.md) - daily temperatures used with EUNITE.
- [05-ipeadata-daily.md](/examples/datasets/05-ipeadata-daily.md) - daily macroeconomic series from Ipea.
- [06-ipeadata-monthly.md](/examples/datasets/06-ipeadata-monthly.md) - monthly macroeconomic series from Ipea.

## Forecasting Competition Archives

- [07-nn3.md](/examples/datasets/07-nn3.md) - monthly business series from the NN3 competition.
- [08-nn5.md](/examples/datasets/08-nn5.md) - daily ATM-withdrawal series from the NN5 competition.
- [09-cats.md](/examples/datasets/09-cats.md) - artificial benchmark with missing blocks.
- [10-santafe-a.md](/examples/datasets/10-santafe-a.md) - nonlinear laser series from the Santa Fe competition.
- [11-santafe-d.md](/examples/datasets/11-santafe-d.md) - long simulated nonlinear series from the Santa Fe competition.
- [17-m1.md](/examples/datasets/17-m1.md) - first Makridakis forecasting competition archive.
- [18-m3.md](/examples/datasets/18-m3.md) - third Makridakis forecasting competition archive.
- [19-m4.md](/examples/datasets/19-m4.md) - fourth Makridakis forecasting competition archive.

## Environmental and Public Indicators

- [12-bioenergy.md](/examples/datasets/12-bioenergy.md) - FAOSTAT bioenergy series.
- [13-climate.md](/examples/datasets/13-climate.md) - land temperature change indicators.
- [14-emissions.md](/examples/datasets/14-emissions.md) - greenhouse-gas emissions totals.
- [15-fertilizers.md](/examples/datasets/15-fertilizers.md) - fertilizers by nutrient series.
- [16-gdp.md](/examples/datasets/16-gdp.md) - GDP and agriculture value-added indicators.
- [20-pesticides.md](/examples/datasets/20-pesticides.md) - pesticides-use series.

## Financial Series

- [21-stocks.md](/examples/datasets/21-stocks.md) - list of B3 stock-market time series with OHLCV fields.
